How were you introduced to table tennis: 
When I was 7, I played a variety of different sports for fun. One of our family friends suggested trying out table tennis, so I started taking lessons once a week. When I was 9, I decided to drop the other sports and focus on table tennis.

Quick Facts
I have 2 dogs and 1 cat. When I grow up, I want to be a veterinarian. My favorite subject in school is science. I'm obsessed with Harry Potter and the Hunger Games.

Did You Know?:
I can't stand soggy cereal. 
I love pranking people. 
I'm a really fast reader. 
I'm a good skier.

My mother introduced me to table tennis.

How long have you been playing the sport?
I have been playing the sport for 17 years

Zhang Yining of China

Quick Facts

Son of John and Patty Wukie. Siblings are Jesse, Nathan, and Wyatt. Married Brianne Pinkerton on December 1, 2012 in Fremont, Ohio. Three daughters are Aria, Gemma and Caroline. Enjoys hunting, fishing, trapping, camping, hiking, spending time with friends and family, and playing foosball and ping pong. Lake Erie charter-boat captain. Devout Christian.

Quick Facts
  • Guide for Mark Bathum since January 2014
  • Ski racing runs in the Yamamoto family. Cade’s mom Claudia raced at an elite level including competing in U.S. Nationals and CanAms. Claudia currently coaches with the Mission Ridge Ski Team in Wenatchee, Washington
  • Hobbies include dirt biking, kayaking and longboarding.

Quick Facts
  • Son of Ron and Stace Yater-Wallace
  • Has one sister, Saren
  • Grandson of Renny Yater, one of the first commercial surfboard builders of the 1950s and founder of Yater surfboards in Santa Barbara, California
  • Hobbies include skateboarding.
